.file-embed.background: rgb(11, 13, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.status-bar.background: rgb(9, 11, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

.view-content.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

body.styled-scrollbars.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

rgba(255, 71, 90, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
rgba(163, 190, 140, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-active.is-clickable.nav-file-titl.background: rgb(17, 19, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.is-selected.mod-complex.suggestion-i.background: rgb(17, 19, 30) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.mod-horizontal.mod-right-split.mod-s.background: rgb(9, 11, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.multi-select-pill.background: rgba(255, 71, 90, 0.1) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.prompt.background: rgb(15, 17, 26) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

div.workspace-leaf.background: rgb(9, 11, 16) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box

input[type=\"search\"].background: rgb(11, 13, 19) none repeat scroll 0% 0% / auto padding-box border-box
